/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -pie -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_account.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_account.dir/test_account_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_account.dir/test_account.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_account.dir/__/src/models/Account.cpp.o -o test_account  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Test.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Multimedia.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
